name: forgeflow
description: ForgeFlow: Explorer replacement, Projects manager, PowerShell execution control plane, and Dashboard.
author: Evotec Services sp. z o.o.

commands.title: Save Multiple Recent Runs as Presets (Project)
Git: Clean Project (Prune + Delete Gone + Delete Merged)

forgeflow.files.favorites.description: Deprecated. Favorites are stored in global state.

forgeflow.projects.scanMaxDepth.description: Maximum directory depth when scanning for projects.

forgeflow.projects.scanCacheMinutes.description: Minutes to reuse project scan results across windows before rescanning (0 = always rescan).

forgeflow.projects.identityScanDepth.description: Maximum folder depth for identity scanning (psd1/csproj/Directory.Build.props).

forgeflow.projects.identityPreferredFold.description: Preferred folder names when choosing identity files.

forgeflow.projects.modifiedScanDepth.description: Depth used to compute recent modified time across files.

forgeflow.projects.entryPointScanDepth.description: Depth used to locate additional entry points (build/scripts/tools).

forgeflow.projects.entryPointPreferredFo.description: Preferred folder names when searching for entry points.

forgeflow.projects.entryPointFileNames.description: File names to treat as entry points (case-insensitive).

forgeflow.projects.entryPointMaxCount.description: Maximum number of auto-discovered entry points per project.

forgeflow.projects.entryPointCacheMinute.description: Minutes to cache entry point discovery results (0 = no cache).

forgeflow.projects.pageSize.description: Maximum number of projects to show before paging (0 = show all).

forgeflow.projects.gitCommitCacheMinutes.description: Minutes to cache git commit timestamps before re-checking.

forgeflow.projects.gitWatch.description: Watch git HEAD for changes to keep commit sorting fresh.

forgeflow.projects.gitWatchMaxRepos.description: Maximum number of git repos to watch for changes.

forgeflow.projects.gitWatchDebounceMs.description: Debounce time in milliseconds for git watch refresh.

forgeflow.powershell.profiles.description: PowerShell profiles available for running scripts.

forgeflow.run.external.keepOpen.description: Keep external PowerShell window open after the script finishes.

forgeflow.run.external.logOutput.description: Send external PowerShell session output to a dedicated output channel.

forgeflow.run.external.reuseSession.description: Reuse a single external PowerShell session per profile (best effort).

forgeflow.run.external.alwaysRestart.description: Always restart the external session before running when reuse is enabled.

forgeflow.run.externalAdmin.keepOpen.description: Keep elevated external PowerShell window open after the script finishes.

forgeflow.run.history.maxItems.description: Maximum number of run history entries to keep.

forgeflow.run.history.perProjectMaxItems.description: Maximum number of recent runs shown per project.

forgeflow.run.history.perProjectSortMode.description: Sorting for recent runs shown per project.

forgeflow.run.byFile.enabled.description: Enable running non-PowerShell files based on file type (opt-in).

forgeflow.run.byFile.csScriptEnabled.description: Allow running single .cs files as scripts (dotnet 10+).

forgeflow.run.byFile.csScriptCommand.description: Command template used for .cs script runs. Tokens: {file}, {project}, {projectDir} (tokens are auto-quoted).

forgeflow.run.byFile.csProjectCommand.description: Command template used when running a .cs file via a project. Tokens: {file}, {project}, {projectDir} (tokens are auto-quoted).

forgeflow.run.byFile.csSolutionCommand.description: Command template used when running a .cs file via a solution (.sln). Tokens: {file}, {project}, {projectDir} (tokens are auto-quoted).

forgeflow.run.byFile.reuseTerminal.description: Reuse the same terminal for run-by-file commands.

forgeflow.filters.projects.minChars.description: Minimum characters before project filtering activates.

forgeflow.filters.scope.description: Where filter values are stored (workspace or global).

forgeflow.filters.files.minChars.description: Minimum characters before files filtering activates.

forgeflow.filters.git.minChars.description: Minimum characters before git filtering activates.

forgeflow.filters.dashboard.minChars.description: Minimum characters before dashboard filtering activates.

forgeflow.filters.files.maxDepth.description: Maximum depth to scan for file filter matches (0 = current folder only).

forgeflow.browser.preferred.description: Preferred browser for ForgeFlow: Open in Browser.

forgeflow.browser.fileExtensions.description: File extensions that trigger Alt+B browser open (without dots).

forgeflow.dashboard.hideArchived.description: Hide archived repositories from the dashboard.

forgeflow.dashboard.autoRefreshMinutes.description: Minutes to reuse dashboard cache across windows before auto-refresh (0 = always refresh).

forgeflow.dashboard.health.enabled.description: Enable dashboard health scoring (README, license, CI, tests, dependency freshness).

forgeflow.dashboard.health.depStaleDays.description: Days before dependency lock/props files are considered stale.

forgeflow.git.staleDays.description: Age in days before a branch is considered stale.

forgeflow.git.defaultBranch.description: Default branch name used for merge checks when origin/HEAD is unavailable.

forgeflow.git.showCleanBranches.description: Show clean branches in the git hygiene view.

forgeflow.git.showProjectSummary.description: Show git branch summary badges in the Projects view.

scripts.test: npm run compile && npm run compile:test && mocha --require test/setup.js out/test/**/*.test.js
scripts.test:coverage: npm run compile && npm run compile:test && c8 -r text -r lcov mocha --require test/setup.js out/test/**/*.test.js
